description: Update state files and verify all quality gates for Phase 8 and Phase 9 completion. Update .agents/state/quant-autonomous-status.json and .agents/state/quant-phase-log.md with Phase 8 and Phase 9 completion evidence. Run full validation suite.
steps: Run pnpm install --frozen-lockfile to ensure dependencies are clean
Run pnpm typecheck and record result (should show 72+ tasks passing)
Run pnpm build and record result
Run pnpm test and record result
Run pnpm lint and record result
Run pnpm audit --audit-level=high and record result
Update .agents/state/quant-autonomous-status.json: set current_phase to 'phase-9-complete', add phase-8 and phase-9 to completed_phases array, update last_updated timestamp
Update .agents/state/quant-phase-log.md with Phase 8 and Phase 9 entries documenting what was built, gate results, and exit criteria met
acceptance_criteria: All 6 quality gates pass (install, typecheck, build, test, lint, audit)
Status JSON reflects phase-9-complete with phases 0-9 in completed_phases
Phase log documents Phase 8 and Phase 9 with evidence
